scope: Trace of OpenAI cognition response storage and conversational CLI rendering behavior.

certified_findings.root_cause: Conversational OCS renders a technical completion summary and does not render normalized cognition content.
certified_findings.minimal_safe_fix: Add a non-authoritative operator cognition renderer sourced from normalized cognition artifacts while preserving the existing technical summary and replay references.

final_outputs.ROOT_CAUSE: conversational OCS renders a technical completion summary and does not render normalized cognition content
final_outputs.MINIMAL_SAFE_FIX: add a non-authoritative operator cognition renderer sourced from normalized cognition artifacts, preserving the existing technical summary and replay references
